---
title: "WNBA 2028 Player Projection Model"
author: "Your Team Names"
date: "2026"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(wehoop)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(httr)
```

## Step 1: Build Team Four Factors (2020–2025)

```{r team_four_factors}
seasons <- 2020:2025

pbp_raw <- load_wnba_pbp(seasons = seasons)
pbp <- pbp_raw %>% filter(season_type == 2)

pbp_tagged <- pbp %>%
  mutate(
    is_three_attempt = shooting_play == TRUE &
      (score_value == 3 |
         str_detect(type_text, regex("3-point|ThreePoint|3Point|three point", 
                                     ignore_case = TRUE))),
    is_ft_attempt = str_detect(type_text, regex("free throw", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    is_ft_made    = is_ft_attempt & scoring_play == TRUE,
    is_fg_attempt = shooting_play == TRUE & !is_ft_attempt,
    is_fg_made    = is_fg_attempt & scoring_play == TRUE,
    is_tov  = str_detect(type_text, regex("turnover", ignore_case = TRUE)) &
              !str_detect(type_text, regex("offensive foul", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    is_oreb = str_detect(type_text, regex("offensive rebound", ignore_case = TRUE)),
    is_dreb = str_detect(type_text, regex("defensive rebound", ignore_case = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    team_abbrev = case_when(
      team_id == home_team_id ~ home_team_abbrev,
      team_id == away_team_id ~ away_team_abbrev,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    opp_abbrev = case_when(
      team_id == home_team_id ~ away_team_abbrev,
      team_id == away_team_id ~ home_team_abbrev,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(team_abbrev))

team_season_raw <- pbp_tagged %>%
  group_by(season, game_id, team_abbrev, opp_abbrev) %>%
  summarise(
    fga  = sum(is_fg_attempt, na.rm = TRUE),
    fgm  = sum(is_fg_made,    na.rm = TRUE),
    fg3a = sum(is_three_attempt, na.rm = TRUE),
    fg3m = sum(is_three_attempt & scoring_play == TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
    fta  = sum(is_ft_attempt, na.rm = TRUE),
    ftm  = sum(is_ft_made,    na.rm = TRUE),
    tov  = sum(is_tov,  na.rm = TRUE),
    oreb = sum(is_oreb, na.rm = TRUE),
    dreb = sum(is_dreb, na.rm = TRUE),
    pts  = sum(score_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

opp_dreb <- team_season_raw %>%
  select(season, game_id, opp_abbrev = team_abbrev, opp_dreb = dreb)

team_season_raw <- team_season_raw %>%
  left_join(opp_dreb, by = c("season", "game_id", "opp_abbrev"))

opp_off <- team_season_raw %>%
  select(season, game_id, opp_abbrev = team_abbrev,
         opp_fga = fga, opp_fgm = fgm, opp_fg3m = fg3m,
         opp_fta = fta, opp_tov = tov, opp_oreb = oreb)

team_with_def <- team_season_raw %>%
  left_join(opp_off, by = c("season", "game_id", "opp_abbrev"))

allstar_teams <- c("EAST", "WEST", "WIL", "STE", "DEL", "PAR", 
                   "ALL", "USA", "WNBASTARS")

team_season_full <- team_with_def %>%
  group_by(season, team_abbrev) %>%
  summarise(
    across(c(fga, fgm, fg3a, fg3m, fta, ftm, tov, oreb, dreb, opp_dreb), 
           sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    across(c(opp_fga, opp_fgm, opp_fg3m, opp_fta, opp_tov, opp_oreb), 
           sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    efg_off = (fgm + 0.5 * fg3m) / fga,
    tov_off = tov / (fga + 0.44 * fta + tov),
    orb_pct = oreb / (oreb + opp_dreb),
    ftr_off = fta / fga,
    efg_def = (opp_fgm + 0.5 * opp_fg3m) / opp_fga,
    tov_def = opp_tov / (opp_fga + 0.44 * opp_fta + opp_tov),
    drb_pct = 1 - (opp_oreb / (opp_oreb + dreb)),
    ftr_def = opp_fta / opp_fga
  ) %>%
  filter(!team_abbrev %in% allstar_teams)
```

## Step 2: Build Player Box Score Dataset (2020–2025)

```{r player_box}
box_raw <- load_wnba_player_box(seasons = seasons) %>%
  filter(season_type == 2, !is.na(athlete_id))

player_season <- box_raw %>%
  group_by(
    season,
    player_id   = athlete_id,
    player_name = athlete_display_name,
    position    = athlete_position_abbreviation,
    team_abbrev = team_abbreviation
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    gp        = n(),
    total_min = sum(minutes,                           na.rm = TRUE),
    fga       = sum(field_goals_attempted,             na.rm = TRUE),
    fgm       = sum(field_goals_made,                  na.rm = TRUE),
    fg3a      = sum(three_point_field_goals_attempted, na.rm = TRUE),
    fg3m      = sum(three_point_field_goals_made,      na.rm = TRUE),
    fta       = sum(free_throws_attempted,             na.rm = TRUE),
    ftm       = sum(free_throws_made,                  na.rm = TRUE),
    oreb      = sum(offensive_rebounds,                na.rm = TRUE),
    dreb      = sum(defensive_rebounds,                na.rm = TRUE),
    tov       = sum(turnovers,                         na.rm = TRUE),
    pts       = sum(points,                            na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    efg_pct     = (fgm + 0.5 * fg3m) / fga,
    tov_rate    = tov / (fga + 0.44 * fta + tov),
    ft_rate     = fta / fga,
    orb_pct     = oreb / (oreb + dreb),
    dreb_pct    = dreb / (oreb + dreb),
    pts_per_min = pts / total_min,
    # Approximate individual ORTG (Dean Oliver simplified)
    ind_poss    = fga + 0.44 * fta + tov,
    approx_ortg = (pts / ind_poss) * 100,
    # Approximate individual DRTG proxy
    approx_drtg = ((tov + (fga - fgm)) / ind_poss) * 100
  ) %>%
  filter(total_min >= 100)
```

## Step 3: Add Age and 2025 Official Ratings

```{r age_and_ratings}
players_2025 <- read.csv('/Users/shashwatmishra/Downloads/WNBA Players 2025 - Sheet1.csv') %>%
  select(player_name = PLAYER, age_2025 = AGE,
         offrtg_2025 = OFFRTG, defrtg_2025 = DEFRTG)

player_season <- player_season %>%
  left_join(players_2025, by = "player_name") %>%
  mutate(age = age_2025 - (2025 - season)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(age))
```

## Step 4: Join Team Context and Position Averages

```{r team_context}
player_season <- player_season %>%
  left_join(
    team_season_full %>% select(season, team_abbrev,
                                 team_efg_off = efg_off,
                                 team_efg_def = efg_def),
    by = c("season", "team_abbrev")
  )

pos_avgs <- player_season %>%
  filter(total_min >= 300) %>%
  group_by(season, position) %>%
  summarise(
    pos_avg_efg     = mean(efg_pct,     na.rm = TRUE),
    pos_avg_tov     = mean(tov_rate,    na.rm = TRUE),
    pos_avg_pts_min = mean(pts_per_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    pos_avg_ortg    = mean(approx_ortg, na.rm = TRUE),
    pos_avg_drtg    = mean(approx_drtg, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

player_season <- player_season %>%
  left_join(pos_avgs, by = c("season", "position")) %>%
  mutate(
    efg_vs_pos  = efg_pct     - pos_avg_efg,
    ortg_vs_pos = approx_ortg - pos_avg_ortg,
    drtg_vs_pos = approx_drtg - pos_avg_drtg
  )
```

## Step 5: Build Wide Dataset (One Row Per Player, Multi-Season)

```{r wide_dataset}
# Create lagged features — prior season stats predict next season ratings
model_data <- player_season %>%
  arrange(player_id, season) %>%
  group_by(player_id) %>%
  mutate(
    lag1_ortg       = lag(approx_ortg, 1),
    lag1_drtg       = lag(approx_drtg, 1),
    lag1_efg        = lag(efg_pct,     1),
    lag1_tov        = lag(tov_rate,    1),
    lag1_ft         = lag(ft_rate,     1),
    lag1_pts_min    = lag(pts_per_min, 1),
    lag1_dreb       = lag(dreb_pct,    1),
    lag1_ortg_v_pos = lag(ortg_vs_pos, 1),
    lag1_drtg_v_pos = lag(drtg_vs_pos, 1),
    lag1_team_off   = lag(team_efg_off,1),
    lag1_team_def   = lag(team_efg_def,1)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(lag1_ortg))

cat("Total rows in model dataset:", nrow(model_data), "\n")
cat("Seasons covered:", paste(sort(unique(model_data$season)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Unique players:", n_distinct(model_data$player_id), "\n")
```

## Step 6: Train/Test Split (80/20)

```{r train_test_split}
set.seed(42)
train_idx <- sample(nrow(model_data), 0.8 * nrow(model_data))
train_set <- model_data[ train_idx, ]
test_set  <- model_data[-train_idx, ]

cat("Training rows:", nrow(train_set), "\n")
cat("Test rows:", nrow(test_set), "\n")
```

## Step 7: ORTG and DRTG Models

```{r models}
# Offensive model
ortg_model <- lm(approx_ortg ~ lag1_ortg + lag1_efg + lag1_tov +
                                lag1_ft + lag1_ortg_v_pos + 
                                lag1_team_off + age,
                 data = train_set)

# Defensive model
drtg_model <- lm(approx_drtg ~ lag1_drtg + lag1_dreb + lag1_tov +
                                lag1_drtg_v_pos + lag1_team_def + age,
                 data = train_set)

summary(ortg_model)
summary(drtg_model)
```

## Step 8: Evaluate on Test Set

```{r evaluation}
test_set$pred_ortg <- predict(ortg_model, newdata = test_set)
test_set$pred_drtg <- predict(drtg_model, newdata = test_set)

ortg_train_mse <- mean(ortg_model$residuals^2)
drtg_train_mse <- mean(drtg_model$residuals^2)
ortg_test_mse  <- mean((test_set$approx_ortg - test_set$pred_ortg)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
drtg_test_mse  <- mean((test_set$approx_drtg - test_set$pred_drtg)^2, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("ORTG Train MSE:", round(ortg_train_mse, 4), "\n")
cat("ORTG Test MSE: ", round(ortg_test_mse,  4), "\n")
cat("DRTG Train MSE:", round(drtg_train_mse, 4), "\n")
cat("DRTG Test MSE: ", round(drtg_test_mse,  4), "\n")

# Visualize predicted vs actual
ggplot(test_set, aes(x = approx_ortg, y = pred_ortg)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#e05c3a") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "ORTG: Predicted vs Actual (Test Set)",
       x = "Actual ORTG", y = "Predicted ORTG") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(test_set, aes(x = approx_drtg, y = pred_drtg)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#3a7de0") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "DRTG: Predicted vs Actual (Test Set)",
       x = "Actual DRTG", y = "Predicted DRTG") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Step 9: Project 2028 ORTG and DRTG

```{r projections}
proj_input <- player_season %>%
  filter(season == 2025, total_min >= 300) %>%
  rename(
    lag1_ortg       = approx_ortg,
    lag1_drtg       = approx_drtg,
    lag1_efg        = efg_pct,
    lag1_tov        = tov_rate,
    lag1_ft         = ft_rate,
    lag1_pts_min    = pts_per_min,
    lag1_dreb       = dreb_pct,
    lag1_ortg_v_pos = ortg_vs_pos,
    lag1_drtg_v_pos = drtg_vs_pos,
    lag1_team_off   = team_efg_off,
    lag1_team_def   = team_efg_def
  ) %>%
  mutate(age = age + 3)  # project to 2028

proj_input$proj_ortg_2028 <- predict(ortg_model, newdata = proj_input)
proj_input$proj_drtg_2028 <- predict(drtg_model, newdata = proj_input)

final_projections <- proj_input %>%
  select(player_name, team_abbrev, position, age,
         proj_ortg_2028, proj_drtg_2028) %>%
  mutate(proj_netrtg_2028 = proj_ortg_2028 - proj_drtg_2028) %>%
  arrange(desc(proj_netrtg_2028))

```


## Step 10: Clean and Rescale Final Projections

```{r rescale_projections}
# Fix duplicate players
final_projections <- final_projections %>%
  group_by(player_name) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = proj_netrtg_2028, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(player_name, team_abbrev, position, age,
         proj_ortg_2028, proj_drtg_2028, proj_netrtg_2028)

# Rescale ORTG to real rating scale using 2025 actuals as reference
actual_2025 <- players_2025 %>%
  select(player_name, offrtg_2025, defrtg_2025)

scale_check <- final_projections %>%
  left_join(actual_2025, by = "player_name") %>%
  filter(!is.na(offrtg_2025))

ortg_scale <- mean(scale_check$offrtg_2025 / scale_check$proj_ortg_2028, na.rm = TRUE)

# Apply final projections:
# - ORTG: model output rescaled to real rating scale
# - DRTG: actual 2025 DEFRTG + aging penalty
#   (box score proxy was unreliable; individual defense requires tracking data)
final_projections <- final_projections %>%
  left_join(actual_2025, by = "player_name") %>%
  mutate(
    proj_ortg_2028   = proj_ortg_2028 * ortg_scale,
    proj_drtg_2028   = defrtg_2025 + (age - 3 - 28) * 0.15,
    proj_netrtg_2028 = proj_ortg_2028 - proj_drtg_2028
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(proj_netrtg_2028))

print(final_projections %>%
  select(player_name, position, age,
         proj_ortg_2028, proj_drtg_2028,
         proj_netrtg_2028), n = Inf)

# Export for draft
write.csv(
  final_projections %>%
    select(player_name, position, age,
           proj_ortg_2028, proj_drtg_2028,
           proj_netrtg_2028),
  '/Users/shashwatmishra/Downloads/WNBA_2028_Projections.csv',
  row.names = FALSE
)
```



```{r}
write.csv(train_set, '/Users/shashwatmishra/Downloads/WNBA_train_set.csv', row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(test_set,  '/Users/shashwatmishra/Downloads/WNBA_test_set.csv',  row.names = FALSE)
```
